title: Minecraft Server API
description: Provides RESTful APIs and WebHooks for managing and automating your Minecraft server.
body:
# MinecraftServerAPI Plugin

**MinecraftServerAPI** is a robust and flexible plugin designed for Minecraft servers, enabling server administrators to interact programmatically with their server using RESTful APIs. This plugin empowers you to automate various server tasks, gather critical information, manage server activities, and trigger WebHooks for specific events.

You can find a list of available endpoints [here](https://msa.shweit.com/).

**Key Features:**
- RESTful API Access: Provides a comprehensive set of RESTful APIs that allow you to manage players, server settings, and more from external applications.
- WebHook Integration: Configure WebHooks to trigger HTTP requests based on specific server events such as player login, server start/stop, and more.
- Custom WebHook Events: Easily send custom WebHook events directly from in-game or the server console.
- Permissions Management: Fine-grained control over who can access the plugin's features, ensuring that only authorized users can interact with the APIs or WebHooks.
- Flexible Configuration: Easily configure the plugin through the config.yml file, including setting API keys, WebHook URLs, and more.

This plugin is ideal for server administrators who want to extend the capabilities of their Minecraft server by integrating it with external applications and services. Whether you want to automate server management tasks, integrate with external monitoring tools, or trigger custom workflows based on in-game events, MinecraftServerAPI provides the flexibility and power you need.


**Support and Contributions:**

If you encounter any issues or want to contribute to the development of this plugin, please visit the GitHub repository and follow the contributing guidelines.
